title: SCP: Total Containment
description: This mod allows you to build and detail your own SCP Foundation facility in your Minecraft world. By adding functional doors, varied level access cards, and atmospheric blocks, you can bring a realistic SCP vibe to your maps.
body:
**This mod is currently a work in progress, so expect bugs and incomplete features.**

This mod allows you to build and customize your own SCP Foundation facility in your Minecraft world. You can add functional doors, various level access cards, and atmospheric blocks to give your maps a realistic SCP feel.

 ✨ **Features:**

- 🎫 **Keycards:** Access cards ranging from Level 0 to Level 5, MTF and O5 cards.
- 📟 **Card Readers & Buttons:**
- Fully functional card readers and buttons for controlling your Redstone systems.
- 🚪 **Doors:** A custom-modeled facility door fitting the iconic SCP atmosphere.

Who is this mod for? It is perfectly designed for SCP map makers, roleplay server creators, or any builder who wants to construct massive, highly detailed underground laboratories in their world.
